/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++  -Os -flto -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nova.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nova.dir/compiler/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/compiler/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/compiler/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/compiler/bytecode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/runtime/vm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/runtime/ffi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/robotics_control/robot_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/advanced_ai_core/ai_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/operating_system_layer/j_kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/full_stack_dev/hyperweb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/standard_library/database/nova_db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/security/nova_security.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/networking/nova_network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/standard_library/finance/nova_finance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/standard_library/health/nova_health.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/game_engine/nova_game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/blockchain_web3/nova_web3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/package_ecosystem/nova_pm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/tooling/nova_tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/universal_packages/python_bridge/py_interop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/ide/vscode_extension/nova_lsp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/hardware_control/embedded_targets/nova_iot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/deployment/nova_deploy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/experiments/quantum/nova_quantum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/graphics/nova_graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/physics_engine/nova_physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/ui/nova_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/testing/nova_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/analytics/nova_telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/docs/nova_docgen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nova.dir/system_logs/nova_logger.cpp.o -o nova
